description_long: This lamp features a classic oil lamp design with a rounded, greenish metal base and a tall, clear glass chimney. The base is composed of two stacked, circular sections with a central knob and a wick adjustment mechanism. A prominent, circular metal reflector is attached to the side, held in place by a metal arm and bracket, and can be rotated or adjusted. The glass chimney is slightly flared at the top and narrows toward the base, providing protection for the flame. The metal components have a weathered, antique finish, suggesting vintage or utilitarian use. The overall construction is robust, with visible screws and joints, and the lamp is likely intended for both functional and decorative purposes in an urban or outdoor setting.
description: A vintage oil lamp with a green metal base, tall clear glass chimney, and a side-mounted circular metal reflector.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular metal reflector facing forward, the glass chimney, and the green metal base with the adjustment knob visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the profile of the reflector, the bracket arm, and the full height of the glass chimney.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the reflector, the supporting metal arm, and the layered structure of the base.
description_view_3: Angled view reveals the open side of the reflector, the adjustment mechanism, and the curvature of the glass chimney.
